title: Melted Ethiopian Beef Stew
description: A sweet and creamy Ethiopian beef stew featuring a cheese pull, tahini richness, and sugar-free-friendly dried apricots.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Add the cubed beef to the pot, browning all sides on medium-high heat for 8 minutes.
Mix in the tomato paste, berbere spice, and a pinch of salt and pepper, stirring to coat the meat and onions.
Pour in the beef broth and bring to a gentle simmer; cover and cook for 45 minutes, until the beef is tender.
Stir in the tahini and chopped dried apricots, allowing the mixture to thicken for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat, stir in the shredded mozzarella until it melts into a gooey coating, then serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
